name: AnnouncementBar
usage_hint: Rotating announcement banner with auto-dismiss and session persistence. Sits above navigation or standalone.
when_to_use: For promotional messages, shipping notices, or time-sensitive announcements. Auto-rotates multiple messages, persists dismissal in sessionStorage. Can be sticky or inline.
when_not_to_use: If you need announcement + nav in one unit, use SiteHeader instead. For static hero banners use a hero section. For urgent alerts use a dedicated alert island (not this).
anti_patterns: Setting speed too fast (<3000ms) — users can't read messages
Using dismissible without sticky (dismissal resets on navigation when not sticky)
Putting multiple AnnouncementBar instances on one page (confusing + redundant)

examples.label: Single sticky announcement
Rotating sale announcements
Linked announcement
